name: deep_insight_report
description: Deep analysis of any crypto project combining Maiat trust data with AI-generated insights. Returns trust score, risk level, review sentiment, strengths, concerns, and a concise AI verdict (buy/use/avoid signal with red flags and green flags). AI analysis powered by Qwen3.5-Flash. Accepts project name or contract address.

aiAnalysis.description: AI-generated verdict: one-sentence signal, top red flags, green flags, confidence level
